title: ceratostylis mamberamensis
intro: Ceratostylis mamberamensis, also known as the Mamberamo orchid, is a species of orchid native to Papua, Indonesia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ceratostylis mamberamensis include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or infused in hot water to harness its medicinal properties.
